title: Create Timeline Item mutaton api dead?
excerpt:
I was just exploring this api for a couple of days to do some data migration and all was working fine. But just about mid day today it just stopped working. Doesn’t even work on the API playground. 
Getting internal_serv…

posts.author: Zepticona (Shahriar Islam Sakil)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was just exploring this api for a couple of days to do some data migration and all was working fine. But just about mid day today it just stopped working. Doesn’t even work on the API playground.

Getting internal_server_error now, was getting “custom_activity_id” required a few hours ago. Funny because this parameter is nowhere to be found in the docs.

Can someone please verify this? Thanks.

Also, what would you suggest me to use to add emails from old CRM System to monday’s activity/email timeline?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Just remember this is in the release candidate API, not stable version. So it is entirely possible they will change or break things until its released.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Zepticona,

@anon29275264 nailed it!

2024-10 is still unstable until October 1st. Our team was working on the create_timeline_item mutation recently to add a new field. It is part of a brand new release so the docs will be ready shortly, but the custom_activity_id field will now be required in the mutation.

Let us know if you have any other questions!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: Zepticona (Shahriar Islam Sakil)
posts.cookedHtml:
You know @anon29275264 and @rachelatmonday, I was just hoping that there would be somebody out there who would refute to what I wrote and point me in the correct direction so that I could resume my work One of those rare occasions where I wanted to be wrong about something.

But it seems I can’t get to work on this just yet as much as I wanted to…

Anyway, thanks for the confirmation @rachelatmonday. I now wait with much anticiaption to see how to use the custom_activity_id field!

Thanks guys!

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Totally understand!

The good news is we added it to the docs and changelog just a bit ago

Here is information about the custom activity object, and the new field is now live in the timeline items object!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: rmachado (Rodrigo Machado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks,

Trying to call the create_timeline_item mutation returns “API Error: Field ‘create_timeline_item’ doesn’t exist on type ‘Mutation’”. The exact same query works when I run it from the API playground.

Using the “https://api.monday.com/v2” endpoint.

Any ideas?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rmachado,

Welcome to the community!

Did you pass the API-Version header in your call? This mutation is only available in 2024-10, so I’d recommend always passing the header with the version you want to call. You can read more here

Let me know if this helps!

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: rmachado (Rodrigo Machado)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rachelatmonday,

I was not! That solves the issue for me!

Thank you!!
